Since the data only includes a single column "title" which contains song titles, we need to examine these titles directly to check for animal names. There is no need to group or manipulate the data further as we can scan the titles as they are. However, to systematically analyze the titles, we can proceed to examine each title for mentions of animals.

The question is asking to identify any animal names mentioned in the song titles, excluding "jaguar." Since the column contains song titles as strings, we need to examine the "title" column for any animal-related keywords. No sorting operation is required here, as the task is simply to look for specific words within the text data.
The song titled "they pray with snakes" mentions the animal "snakes". Besides the jaguar named in "lady in the jaguar", snakes are the other animal mentioned in the song titles.
